mission:
Now I have a thorough understanding of all the target modules. Here's the implementation spec:

---

stagnation.pivot: Reduce parallelism. Focus agents on fewer, higher-impact tasks.

discoveries: [auto-update-pipeline] (report) Completed: (1) Created src/autodev/auto_update.py with AutoUpdatePipeline class -- bridges intel proposals to swarm missions, low-risk auto-launches, high-risk gates via Telegram. (2) Added applied_proposals table to db.py with is_proposal_applied(), record_applied_proposal(), get_applied_proposals() methods. Dedup by title since proposal IDs are regenerated each scan. (3) Added autodev auto-update CLI command with --dry-run, --approve-all, --threshold flags. (4) Created 13 tests covering DB table, pipeline dry-run, auto-launch, dedup, high-risk approval/rejection/skip, CLI parsing. All 2686 tests pass, ruff clean.
[trace-analyzer-impl] (report) Created TraceAnalyzer with analyze_run, analyze_history, generate_report, and llm_review_traces. All 13 tests pass, lint clean.

[auto-review-hook] (report) Completed: Added _run_trace_review() method to SwarmController, called after _generate_completion_report() in cleanup(). Writes REVIEW.md to .autodev-traces/{run_id}/, appends recommendations to learnings file. Error-handling wraps entire flow so trace failure never crashes cleanup. Added 3 tests (review+learnings written, no-op on empty traces, no crash on error). Verified _handle_escalate already uses correct self._config.notifications.telegram pattern (was fixed by prior agent). All 2788 tests pass, ruff clean.

[final-integration-verify] (report) Final integration verification PASSED. All 9 spec items confirmed: (1) ratchet.py - GitRatchet class imports OK, (2) oracle.py - check_oracle_violation + 8 PROTECTED_PATTERNS imports OK, (3) trace_review.py - TraceAnalyzer imports OK, (4) contrib.py - ContributorProtocol imports OK, (5) auto_update.py has _check_rate_limit + _review_modification, (6) db.py Database.count_proposals_applied_since exists, (7) cli.py has trace-review + contrib subcommands, (8) swarm/controller.py has _run_trace_review in cleanup. Fixed 12 E501 lint errors across 5 files. Final: 2788 tests pass, 1 skipped, 0 lint errors.

[metrics-impl] (report) Completed: (1) Created src/autodev/metrics.py with SwarmMetrics dataclass, MetricsTracker class (record_run, get_trend, correlate_with_modifications). TSV-based storage. Trend detection compares first/second half averages. (2) Added _record_metrics() hook in controller.py cleanup() after _run_trace_review(). Extracts cost, task counts, agent success rate from SwarmState. Wrapped in try/except. (3) Created 17 tests covering dataclass, TSV write/append/roundtrip, trend analysis (increasing/decreasing/stable/velocity/best-worst), correlation with experiments. (4) SKIPPED cli.py metrics subcommand -- file is in avoid list (scheduler-impl owns it). Planner should assign cli.py metrics subcommand to scheduler-impl or another agent. All 2836 tests pass, 1 skipped, my files lint clean.

[web-sources-impl] (report) Completed: (1) Added trust_level field to Finding model with default 'medium'. (2) Created web_sources.py with WebSourceScanner class -- 5 sources (anthropic_blog, openai_blog, deepmind_blog, github_trending, arxiv_agents), concurrent scanning, relevance scoring using AUTOMATION_KEYWORDS from claude_code.py, HTML parsing via regex. (3) Registered WebSourceScanner in scanner.py run_scan() with error handling. (4) Created 21 tests covering relevance scoring, Finding trust_level, blog/trending/arxiv scanning, error handling, URL resolution, scanner integration. All 2836 tests pass, 1 skipped, ruff clean.

[metrics-cli-retry] (report) Completed: metrics subcommand already existed in cli.py from previous agent (metrics-impl skipped it, scheduler-impl/spec-generator-impl added it). Added 7 tests for cmd_metrics covering: default output, no-data, --trend, --trend with insufficient data, --correlate with no data, arg parsing, --last-n flag. Fixed 2 lint issues: E501 line too long in cli.py metrics subparser, F401 unused MetricsTracker import in tests. All 36 CLI tests pass, full suite 2861 pass, ruff clean.

[final-verify] (report) Final integration verification complete. 2861 tests passed (1 skipped), ruff lint clean. All 10 self-recursion loop spec items verified: WebSourceScanner, run_scan registration, SpecGenerator, _generate_spec in auto_update, AutoUpdateScheduler, CLI daemon/interval flags, SwarmMetrics/MetricsTracker, _record_metrics in controller, metrics CLI subcommand, and dedicated test files for each component.

[config-pipeline-impl] (report) Completed: (1) IntelligenceConfig dataclass added to config.py with evaluator_mode and max_daily_modifications fields, wired into MissionConfig and TOML loader. (2) scanner.py restructured to return raw findings only (removed evaluate_findings/generate_proposals calls). (3) auto_update.py updated with evaluator selection: LLM evaluator when mode='llm' with fallback to keyword, keyword evaluator when mode='keyword'. Removed duplicate _check_rate_limit() from _auto_launch(). (4) Tests updated: 5 IntelligenceConfig tests in test_config.py, existing auto_update tests adapted for new pipeline (mock keyword evaluator instead of mock proposals), 3 new evaluator selection tests added. 2927 tests pass (2 pre-existing failures in test_llm_evaluator.py owned by llm-evaluator-impl peer), ruff clean.

[browser-fix] (report) browser.py and test_browser.py are already complete and working. 32 browser tests pass, ruff lint clean, full suite 2942 pass (1 skipped). Previous agents completed the implementation before being killed. The SIGKILL was likely from attempting to install/run Playwright, not from code issues. No changes required.
